entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 23
entries.excerpt: A psalm of David himself. The Church speaks to Christ: The Lord feeds me, and I shall lack nothing Psalm 22:1. The Lord Jesus Christ is my Shepherd, and I shall lack nothing. In a place of pasture there has He placed me Psalm 22:2. In a place of fresh pasture, leading me to faith, there has He placed me to be nourished. By the water of refreshing has He brought me up. By the water of baptism, whereby they are refreshed who have lost health and strength, has He brought me up. He has converted my soul: He has led me forth in the paths of righteousness, for His Name's sake Psalm 22:3. He has…
